description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux/MacOS Build that runs on push and pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix job strategy to build and test on multiple OS (macos-latest, ubuntu-24.04), compiler (g++-13, clang++), build types (Release, Debug), and task backends (Threads, OneTBB, PaRSEC, LegacyTBB). For each matrix combination, install prerequisites, configure CMake, build, test, and optionally install.
